/** * Helper method used for deserializing String value, if possible, doing * necessary conversion or throwing exception as necessary. *

* Starting with 2.14 will also start checking {@code CoercionConfig} * configuration to check whether coercion needed is allowed. * * @param p Currently active parser being iterated over * @param ctxt Deserialization context * @param nullProvider Entity we (only) need for case of secondary value * type being coerced into {@code null}: if so, provider is asked for * possible "null replacement" value. * * @since 2.14 (with this signature) */
